verses.13: Yawma yudaAAAAoona ila nari jahannama daAAAAan
verses.14: Hathihi alnnaru allatee kuntum biha tukaththiboona
verses.15: Afasihrun hatha am antum la tubsiroona
verses.16: Islawha faisbiroo aw la tasbiroo sawaon AAalaykum innama tujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.18: Fakiheena bima atahum rabbuhum wawaqahum rabbuhum AAathaba aljaheemi
verses.19: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona
verses.20: Muttakieena AAala sururin masfoofatin wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin
verses.21: Waallatheena amanoo waittabaAAathum thurriyyatuhum bieemanin alhaqna bihim thurriyyatahum wama alatnahum min AAamalihim min shayin kullu imriin bima kasaba raheenun
verses.23: YatanazaAAoona feeha kasan la laghwun feeha wala tatheemun
verses.24: Wayatoofu AAalayhim ghilmanun lahum kaannahum luluon maknoonun
verses.26: Qaloo inna kunna qablu fee ahlina mushfiqeena
verses.27: Famanna Allahu AAalayna wawaqana AAathaba alssamoomi
verses.28: Inna kunna min qablu nadAAoohu innahu huwa albarru alrraheemu
verses.29: Fathakkir fama anta biniAAmati rabbika bikahin wala majnoonin
verses.30: Am yaqooloona shaAAirun natarabbasu bihi rayba almanooni
verses.31: Qul tarabbasoo fainnee maAAakum mina almutarabbiseena
verses.32: Am tamuruhum ahlamuhum bihatha am hum qawmun taghoona
verses.33: Am yaqooloona taqawwalahu bal la yuminoona
verses.34: Falyatoo bihadeethin mithlihi in kanoo sadiqeena
verses.35: Am khuliqoo min ghayri shayin am humu alkhaliqoona
verses.36: Am khalaqoo alssamawati waalarda bal la yooqinoona
verses.37: Am AAindahum khazainu rabbika am humu almusaytiroona
verses.38: Am lahum sullamun yastamiAAoona feehi falyati mustamiAAuhum bisultanin mubeenin
verses.40: Am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqaloona
verses.42: Am yureedoona kaydan faallatheena kafaroo humu almakeedoona
verses.43: Am lahum ilahun ghayru Allahi subhana Allahi AAamma yushrikoona
verses.44: Wain yaraw kisfan mina alssamai saqitan yaqooloo sahabun markoomun
verses.45: Fatharhum hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee feehi yusAAaqoona
verses.46: Yawma la yughnee AAanhum kayduhum shayan wala hum yunsaroona
verses.47: Wainna lillatheena thalamoo AAathaban doona thalika walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona
verses.48: Waisbir lihukmi rabbika fainnaka biaAAyunina wasabbih bihamdi rabbika heena taqoomu
